---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve this portfolio template
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: subhamrexpaul
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
<!-- A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "It's always frustrating when..." -->

**Describe the solution you'd like**
<!-- A clear description of what you want to happen -->

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've considered -->

**Design notes**
<!-- If applicable, describe the visual design or UX you envision -->

**Technical considerations**
<!-- Any technical challenges or considerations you foresee -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, code examples, or inspiration from other sites -->

---
**Implementation checklist**
- [ ] This feature doesn't break existing functionality
- [ ] This feature is responsive across devices
- [ ] This feature respects prefers-reduced-motion
- [ ] This feature maintains accessibility standards

**Mockups**
<!-- If you have design ideas, describe them here -->

**Inspiration**
<!-- Links to similar features on other sites that inspired this request -->
